mapper.update:
UPDATE UM_UPD_PLAN_STS_MST
STM_LAST_UPD_DATE = #{insertTime}, STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID = #{system_nm}, MAC_ADDR = #{stb_info.mac_addr}, STB_SW_VER = #{update_info.stb_sw_ver}, STB_SW_PLAN_INST_VER = #{update_info.stb_inst_ver}, STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER = #{stb_info.stb_last_ver}, MODL_NM = #{stb_info.modl_nm}, SW_ID = #{update_info.sw_id}, SW_FILE_VER = #{update_info.sw_file_ver}, ERR_CD = #{update_info.result}, ERR_EXPL = #{update_info.reason}, UPD_SCOP_CD = #{stb_info.upd_scop_cd}, CUST_NOTY_MT_FG_CD = #{stb_info.cust_noty_mt_fg_cd},
WHERE PLAN_ID = #{update_info.plan_id} AND EXE_SCH_ID = #{update_info.exe_sch_id} AND STB_ID = #{stb_info.stb_id} AND STM_FIR_REG_DATE = (SELECT MAX(STM_FIR_REG_DATE) FROM UM_UPD_PLAN_STS_MST WHERE STB_ID = #{stb_info.stb_id})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UM_UPD_PLAN_STS_HST ( SEQ_ID, PTN_DY, PLAN_ID, EXE_SCH_ID, STB_ID, MAC_ADDR, STB_SW_VER, STB_SW_PLAN_INST_VER, STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER, MODL_NM, SW_ID, SW_FILE_VER, ERR_CD, ERR_EXPL, UPD_SCOP_CD, CUST_NOTY_MT_FG_CD, STM_FIR_REG_DATE, STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID ) VALUES( UM_UPD_PLAN_STS_HST_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{ptn_dy}, #{update_info.plan_id}, #{update_info.exe_sch_id}, #{stb_info.stb_id}, #{stb_info.mac_addr}, #{update_info.stb_sw_ver}, #{update_info.stb_inst_ver}, #{stb_info.stb_last_ver}, #{stb_info.modl_nm}, #{update_info.sw_id}, #{update_info.sw_file_ver}, #{update_info.result}, #{update_info.reason}, #{stb_info.upd_scop_cd}, #{stb_info.cust_noty_mt_fg_cd}, #{insertTime}, #{system_nm} )

INSERT INTO UM_UPD_PLAN_STS_MST ( PLAN_ID, EXE_SCH_ID, STB_ID, MAC_ADDR, STB_SW_VER, STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER, MODL_NM, ERR_CD, ERR_EXPL, STM_FIR_REG_DATE, STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID, STM_LAST_UPD_DATE, STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID ) VALUES( #{plan_id}, #{exe_sch_id}, #{stb_info.stb_id}, #{stb_info.mac_addr}, #{stb_info.stb_sw_ver}, #{stb_info.stb_last_ver}, #{stb_info.modl_nm}, #{result}, #{reason}, #{insertTime}, #{system_nm}, #{insertTime}, #{system_nm} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE UM_UPD_PLAN_STS_MST
STM_LAST_UPD_DATE = #{insertTime}, STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID = #{system_nm}, MAC_ADDR = #{stb_info.mac_addr}, STB_SW_VER = #{stb_info.stb_sw_ver}, STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER = #{stb_info.stb_last_ver}, MODL_NM = #{stb_info.modl_nm}, ERR_CD = #{result}, ERR_EXPL = #{reason},
WHERE PLAN_ID = #{plan_id} AND EXE_SCH_ID = #{exe_sch_id} AND STB_ID = #{stb_info.stb_id} AND STM_FIR_REG_DATE = (SELECT MAX(STM_FIR_REG_DATE) FROM UM_UPD_PLAN_STS_MST WHERE STB_ID = #{stb_info.stb_id})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UM_UPD_PLAN_STS_HST ( SEQ_ID, PTN_DY, PLAN_ID, EXE_SCH_ID, STB_ID, MAC_ADDR, STB_SW_VER, STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER, MODL_NM, ERR_CD, ERR_EXPL, STM_FIR_REG_DATE, STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID ) VALUES( UM_UPD_PLAN_STS_HST_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{ptn_dy}, #{plan_id}, #{exe_sch_id}, #{stb_info.stb_id}, #{stb_info.mac_addr}, #{stb_info.stb_sw_ver}, #{stb_info.stb_last_ver}, #{stb_info.modl_nm}, #{result}, #{reason}, #{insertTime}, #{system_nm} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE DM_DVC_MST
STB_SW_VER = #{stb_info.stb_sw_ver},
STM_LAST_UPD_DATE = #{insertTime}, STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID = #{system_nm}, STB_LAST_CONN_DATE = #{insertTime}, CLNT_PUB_IPADDR = #{stbPublicIp}, CLNT_IPADDR = #{stb_info.stbIp}, STM_UPTM = TO_DATE(#{stb_info.stbUptime}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), RCU_PAIRING = #{stb_info.rcuPairing}, RCU_MANUFR_CD = #{stb_info.rcuManufacturerCode}, RCU_FIRM_VER = #{stb_info.rcuFirmVersion}, WEB_UI_VER = #{stb_info.webUiVersion}, NATIVE_UI_VER = #{stb_info.nativeUiVersion}, TRIGGER_CD = #{stb_info.triggerCode}, HDMI_POW = #{stb_info.hdmiPower},
WHERE STB_ID = #{stb_info.stb_id}
mapper.select: SELECT t1.STB_ID , t1.PLAN_ID , t1.EXE_SCH_ID , t1.STB_SW_VER , t1.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER , t1.TEAM_CD , t1.LOCK_YN , t1.UPD_YN , t1.REQ_SVC , t2.modl_cd , t2.cug_id FROM (SELECT PHYSICAL_STB.MODEL_CODE AS modl_cd , STB.SERVICE_CODE AS cug_id , STB.STB_ID FROM STB, PHYSICAL_STB, STB_MODEL WHERE STB.STB_ID = PHYSICAL_STB.STB_ID AND PHYSICAL_STB.MODEL_CODE = STB_MODEL.MODEL_CODE AND STB.STB_ID = #{stb_info.stb_id} AND PHYSICAL_STB.MAC_ADDRESS = #{stb_info.mac_addr} ) t2 , DM_DVC_MST t1 WHERE t1.STB_ID = t2.STB_ID AND t1.STB_ID = #{stb_info.stb_id} AND t1.UPD_YN = 'Y'

SELECT A.PLAN_ID, A.ROOT_PLAN_ID, A.PLAN_NM, A.STB_UI_VER, A.PLAN_APL_FG_CD, A.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER, B.EXE_SCH_ID, A.UPD_STS_FG_CD FROM UM_UPD_PLAN_MST A, UM_UPD_PLAN_EXE_SCH_LST B WHERE A.PLAN_ID = B.PLAN_ID AND A.UPD_STS_FG_CD != '4' AND A.PLAN_APL_FG_CD IN ('02','03') AND A.PLAN_ID IN (SELECT STBL_PLAN_ID FROM UM_UPD_PLAN_STBL_VER_MAP WHERE MODL_CD = #{modl_cd} AND CUG_ID = #{cug_id} AND REQ_SVC = #{req_svc})
mapper.update: UPDATE DM_DVC_MST SET PLAN_ID = #{plan_id}, EXE_SCH_ID = #{exe_sch_id}, STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER = #{stb_sw_plan_last_ver}, STM_LAST_UPD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE STB_ID = #{stb_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UM_UPD_PLAN_COM_HST ( PLAN_ID, EXE_SCH_ID, STB_ID, STM_FIR_REG_DATE, STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID, STM_LAST_UPD_DATE, STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID ) VALUES( #{update_info.plan_id}, #{update_info.exe_sch_id}, #{stb_info.stb_id}, #{insertTime}, #{system_nm}, #{insertTime}, #{system_nm} )

INSERT INTO UM_UPD_ACC_DISTB_STS_HST ( ACC_TRANS_ID, ACC_DISTB_ID, STB_ID, STB_MAC_ADDR, STB_MODL_NM, ACC_MAC_ADDR, ACC_MODL_NM, ACC_SW_VER, ACC_SW_DISTB_INST_VER, ACC_SW_DISTB_LAST_VER, SW_ID, SW_FILE_VER, ERR_CD, ERR_EXPL, STM_FIR_REG_DATE, STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID, STM_LAST_UPD_DATE, STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID ) VALUES( #{update_info.acc_trans_id}, #{update_info.acc_distb_id}, #{stb_info.stb_id}, #{stb_info.mac_addr}, #{stb_info.modl_nm}, #{acc_info.acc_mac_addr}, #{acc_info.acc_modl_nm}, #{update_info.acc_sw_ver}, #{update_info.acc_inst_ver}, #{acc_info.acc_last_ver}, #{update_info.sw_id}, #{update_info.sw_file_ver}, #{update_info.result}, #{update_info.reason}, #{insertTime}, #{system_nm}, #{insertTime}, #{system_nm} )
mapper.select: SELECT /*+ LEADING(STB DDM DUVM) */ STB.STB_ID as "stb_id" , PS.MAC_ADDRESS as "mac_addr" , STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM as "user_service_num" , DDM.STB_SW_VER as "stb_sw_ver" , DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER as "stb_last_ver" , TO_CHAR(DDM.STM_UPTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') as "stm_uptm" , DDM.CLNT_IPADDR as "clnt_ipaddr" , DDM.CLNT_PUB_IPADDR as "clnt_pub_ipaddr" , (SELECT MCM.CUG_NM FROM DM_CUG_MST DCM ,MN_CUG_MST MCM WHERE To_char(STB.SERVICE_CODE) = DCM.CUG_ID AND DCM.CUG_ID = MCM.CUG_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) as "cug_expl" , DDM.STB_LAST_CONN_DATE as "stb_last_conn_date" , DUVM.STB_UI_VER as "stb_ui_version" , UUPSH.STB_SW_PLAN_INST_VER as "stb_inst_ver" , UUPSH.STM_FIR_REG_DATE AS "stb_inst_date" FROM STB STB JOIN DM_DVC_MST DDM ON STB.STB_ID = DDM.STB_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN PHYSICAL_STB PS ON STB.STB_ID = PS.STB_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DM_UI_VER_MAP DUVM ON (TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,4,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,7,3))||'-'||SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,10,4)) = DUVM.STB_FULL_VER LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY STM_FIR_REG_DATE DESC) RN, STB_ID, STB_SW_PLAN_INST_VER, STM_FIR_REG_DATE FROM UM_UPD_PLAN_STS_HST WHERE ERR_CD = '5100' AND STB_ID = (SELECT STB_ID FROM STB WHERE USER_SERVICE_NUM = #{user_service_num} AND ROWNUM = 1) ) UUPSH ON STB.STB_ID = UUPSH.STB_ID AND RN = 1 WHERE STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM = #{user_service_num}
